title: Functional Core, Imperative Shell, and Production Integration · Evaluation Trace: Functional Core Shell
summary: Rebuild an unreliable data-processing service as a pure decision core with explicit operational effects. Planned artifact: Add and verify the fp functional core shell increment in a production-shaped functional service and decision record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Separate pure domain decisions from I/O orchestration with explicit data contracts.
Measure bounded consumption and scaling without turning timing noise into correctness claims.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
